changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create sync function and trigger: module_study_event → study_event
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_study_event_to_study_event() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO study_event ( study_event_id, study_subject_id, study_event_definition_id, status_id, subject_event_status_id, location, sample_ordinal, date_start, date_end, start_time_flag, end_time_flag, date_created, date_updated, owner_id, update_id, sed_ordinal ) VALUES ( NEW.study_event_id, NEW.study_subject_id, NEW.study_event_definition_id, NEW.status_id, NEW.subject_event_status_id, NEW.location, NEW.sample_ordinal, NEW.date_start, NEW.date_end, NEW.start_time_flag, NEW.end_time_flag, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.owner_id, NEW.update_id, NEW.sed_ordinal ); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE study_event SET study_subject_id = NEW.study_subject_id, study_event_definition_id = NEW.study_event_definition_id, status_id = NEW.status_id, subject_event_status_id = NEW.subject_event_status_id, location = NEW.location, sample_ordinal = NEW.sample_ordinal, date_start = NEW.date_start, date_end = NEW.date_end, start_time_flag = NEW.start_time_flag, end_time_flag = NEW.end_time_flag, date_created = NEW.date_created, date_updated = NEW.date_updated, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, update_id = NEW.update_id, sed_ordinal = NEW.sed_ordinal WHERE study_event_id = OLD.study_event_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM study_event WHERE study_event_id = OLD.study_event_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_module_study_event AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON module_study_event FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_module_study_event_to_study_event();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_module_study_event ON module_study_event; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_module_study_event_to_study_event();
